emails.subject: Long time no talk
emails.snippet: Thinking of you and hoping all is well. Let's not let so much time pass next time. Miss you!

emails.subject: Sending love
emails.snippet: Just sending some love your way. Hope you're taking care of yourself. Let's talk soon!

emails.subject: Remember when...
emails.snippet: Found an old video of us from college. Brings back so many memories! Miss you, friend. We need to catch up soon.
